nasb.text: He was afraid and said, “How awesome is this place! This is none other than the house of God, and this is the gate of heaven.”

esv.text: And he was afraid and said, “How awesome is this place! This is none other than the house of God, and this is the gate of heaven.”

cnv.text: 他就懼怕起來，說：“這地方多麼可畏啊，這不是別的地方，而是　神的殿，是天的門。”

ccb.text: 他就害怕起来，说：“这地方何等可畏！这里是上帝的家，是通天的大门。”

csbs.text: 他就害怕起来，说：“这地方真可畏！这里一定是神的殿，天的门。”
